title: SKT's Mobile Performance Pack [MP2]
description: Simple performance-focused modpacks designed for Android and IOS Minecraft Launcher (Pojav, Mojo, Zalith, Amethyst)
body:
![MPP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90a4883d6391e5189f560e47a2dae5f10695afd.jpeg) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp)
Klik untuk deskripsi Berbahasa Indonesia ### ⚠️⠄Penting!!! Atur renderer ke MobileGlues di pengaturan renderer dan profil instance. jika masih crash coba untuk menghapus Sodium, Sodium-Extra, Reese's Sodium Options. Jika kalian masih mengalami bug dan crash, laporkan pada [Social Media](https://bento.me/skt) atau [Server Discord-ku](https://discord.gg/RZeSBqs97A) terlebih dahulu sebelum melaporkan terhadap Developer Mod dan Launcher. ### 📖⠄Deskripsi ModPack simpel yang di-fokuskan untuk meningkatkan performa Minecraft pada launcer Android dan IOS (Pojav, Mojo, Zalith, Amethyst) ### 📈⠄Perbandingan **Tanpa ModPack.**
Rata-rata 150 FPS
8 Chunks
Fast Graphic **Dengan ModPack.**
Rata-rata 400 FPS
8 Chunks
Fast Graphic *Di-tes pada perangkat handphone POCO M4 Pro 4g (8/256), Helio G96, Mali GPU, Tanpa ROOT* **Perangkat yang berbeda mungkin memberikan hasil yang berbeda. ### 💯⠄Rekomendasi • Gunakan **Java Arguments** untuk mengurangi stuttering dan meningkatkan efisiensi memori.
Coba menggunakan Ini -Xmx4G -Xms4G -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:SoftMaxHeapSize=1G -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch
**Hapus Java Argument terlebih dahulu setiap kali kalian menginstal Mod Loader/ModPack • Nyalakan **V-sync, Sustained Performance Mode & Alternative Surface Rendering** pada pengaturan launcher, bukan pada pengaturan Minecraft. • Pada menu pengaturan Minecraft atur **Maximum FPS** kalian sesuai dengan Refresh Rate layar kalian, lalu ditambahkan 10. Contoh, Untuk layar 60Hz, Atur menjadi 70 FPS. ### 🚨⠄Lapor Bug & Saran Gabung ke Discord serverku > [SKT x SenkuMC Enchanters](https://discord.gg/RZeSBqs97A) Saluran WhatsApp Khusus Berbahasa Indonesia > [Klik Untuk Bergabung](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb7Qh4d89incrkIPAP2M)
### ⚠️⠄Important!!! Set renderer to MobileGlues on renderer settings or instance profile settings. if it doesn't work, try remove Sodium, Sodium-Extra, Reese's Sodium Options. If you still encounter any crash or bug, report on my [Social Media](https://bento.me/skt) or [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RZeSBqs97A) first before reporting to the Mods or Launcher Developer. ### 📖⠄Description Simple performance-focused modpacks designed for Android and IOS Minecraft Launcher (Pojav, Mojo, Zalith, Amethyst) ### 📈⠄Comparison **Without ModPack.**
150 FPS Average
8 Chunks
Fast Graphic **With ModPack.**
400 FPS Average
8 Chunks
Fast Graphic *Tested on POCO M4 Pro 4g (8/256), Helio G96, Mali GPU, Without ROOT* **Different devices might get different results ### 💯⠄Recommendation • Use **Java Arguments** for reducing stuttering and improve garbage collection.
Try using this -Xmx4G -Xms4G -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:SoftMaxHeapSize=1G -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch
**Remove Java Argument first every time you install Mod Loader/ModPack • Enable **V-sync, Sustained Performance Mode & Alternative Surface Rendering** on launcher settings, not on Minecraft settings. • Go to Minecraft settings and set your **Maximum FPS** to your screen’s refresh rate plus 10. For example, for a 60 Hz screen, set it to 70 FPS. ### 🚨⠄Bug Report & Suggestion Join my Discord server > [SKT x SenkuMC Enchanters](https://discord.gg/RZeSBqs97A) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp) ### 👋🏼⠄Follow Me [![sosmed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16cc8f715524df9efac5b04aade8d340d512c1d9.jpeg)](https://bento.me/skt) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp) ### 🤝🏼⠄Partner [![smchub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/449a0f478001c085f260386eb494153e53b3a77b.jpeg)](https://bento.me/smchub)
